name: Edik van Nantes
overview: Just outside Nantes, on the le Roux family farm, stands a historic stone house, uninhabited for decades. In this series, Nataniël and Erik finally transform the house into a holiday home for the whole family, making a play area for all the godchildren and grandchildren and installing a free-standing kitchen.

trailers.title: ’n Lus vir die oog – Edik van Nantes – Winter | Kyknet
